subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! How blessed is thy destiny that thou and thy children and descendants are gathered beneath the shadow of the Word of Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله چه خوش طالعی که خود و اولاد و احفادت در ظل کلمه وحدانیت مجتمع
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God
